Zhang Hong ејөејҳ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Hong (ејөејҳ). Refused to kill Chen DengвҖҷs family, instead getting them to safety. Zhang Hong was affiliated with Lu Bu.
